Comment: Stage and route exact S3 object versions with independent durable idempotency checkpoints

Unsupported Event.Cause: The workflow only accepts FileReceived.v1 and FileScanResultRecorded.v1 events

Choices.Condition: {% $event.version = '0' and $event.`detail-type` = 'FileReceived.v1' and $event.source = 'uk.gov.justice.service.managed-file-transfer' and $event.account = $expectedAccountId and $incomingObjectBucket = $incomingBucket and $type($eventId) = 'string' and $length($eventId) > 0 and $type($fileId) = 'string' and $length($fileId) > 0 and $type($correlationId) = 'string' and $length($correlationId) > 0 and $type($idempotencyKey) = 'string' and $length($idempotencyKey) > 0 and $type($incomingObjectKey) = 'string' and $length($incomingObjectKey) > 0 and $type($incomingObjectVersionId) = 'string' and $length($incomingObjectVersionId) > 0 and $type($incomingObjectSizeBytes) = 'number' and $floor($incomingObjectSizeBytes) = $incomingObjectSizeBytes and $incomingObjectSizeBytes >= 0 and $incomingObjectSizeBytes <= $maximumSize %}

Invalid Event.Cause: The event does not satisfy the FileReceived.v1 workflow contract

Invalid Stored Operation.Cause: The idempotency record is missing required workflow state

Invalid Incoming Object.Cause: The exact incoming version does not match the event or uses reserved metadata

Multipart Reconciliation Failure.Cause: An ambiguous multipart upload could not be reconciled safely

Arguments.UpdateExpression: SET #status = :status, upload_id = :upload_id, part_count = :part_count, part_size = :part_size, updated_at = :updated, in_progress_expiration = :lease

Choices.Condition: {% $partsListTruncated = false and $count($completedParts) = $partCount and $count($filter($completedParts, function($part) { $part.PartNumber >= 1 and $part.PartNumber <= $partCount and $part.Size = ($part.PartNumber = $partCount ? $incomingObjectSizeBytes - (($partCount - 1) * $partSize) : $partSize) })) = $partCount %}

{% $processingObjectHead.ContentLength = $incomingObjectSizeBytes and $processingObjectHead.ServerSideEncryption = 'aws:kms' and $processingObjectHead.SsekmsKeyId = $processingKmsKeyArn and $count($keys($processingObjectHead.Metadata)) = $count($keys($expectedProcessingObjectMetadata)) and $count($filter($keys($expectedProcessingObjectMetadata), function($key) { $lookup($processingObjectHead.Metadata, $key) = $lookup($expectedProcessingObjectMetadata, $key) })) = $count($keys($expectedProcessingObjectMetadata)) and $processingObjectTagFingerprint = $incomingObjectTagFingerprint %}

Ambiguous Copy Failure.Cause: The copy outcome could not be reconciled without risking a duplicate processing version

Arguments.UpdateExpression: SET #status = :status, copy_method = :copy_method, processing_bucket = :processing_bucket, processing_key = :processing_key, processing_version_id = :processing_version_id, processing_object_lookup_key = :processing_object_lookup_key, updated_at = :updated, in_progress_expiration = :lease

Uncheckpointed Copy Rolled Back.Cause: The exact processing version was removed because its durable checkpoint did not commit

Ambiguous Copied Checkpoint Failure.Cause: The copy checkpoint outcome could not be reconciled safely

Uncheckpointed Processing Cleanup Failur.Cause: The uncheckpointed processing version could not be removed safely

Arguments.UpdateExpression: SET #status = :status, updated_at = :updated, in_progress_expiration = :lease REMOVE upload_id, part_count, part_size

Multipart Copy Failure.Cause: The multipart copy failed after its bounded recovery attempt

Choices.Condition: {% $processingObjectHead.ContentLength = $incomingObjectSizeBytes and $processingObjectHead.ServerSideEncryption = 'aws:kms' and $processingObjectHead.SsekmsKeyId = $processingKmsKeyArn and $count($keys($processingObjectHead.Metadata)) = $count($keys($expectedProcessingObjectMetadata)) and $count($filter($keys($expectedProcessingObjectMetadata), function($key) { $lookup($processingObjectHead.Metadata, $key) = $lookup($expectedProcessingObjectMetadata, $key) })) = $count($keys($expectedProcessingObjectMetadata)) and $processingObjectTagFingerprint = $incomingObjectTagFingerprint %}

Processing Object Verification Failure.Cause: The processing version does not match the exact incoming object attributes

Arguments.UpdateExpression: SET #status = :status, staged_event_id = :event_id, staged_event_idempotency_key = :idempotency_key, published_at = :published, updated_at = :updated, in_progress_expiration = :lease

Choices.Condition: {% $event.version = '0' and $event.`detail-type` = 'FileScanResultRecorded.v1' and $event.source = 'uk.gov.justice.service.managed-file-transfer' and $event.account = $expectedAccountId and $routingSourceBucket = $processingBucket and $scanResultStatus in ['NO_THREATS_FOUND', 'THREATS_FOUND', 'UNSUPPORTED', 'ACCESS_DENIED', 'FAILED'] and $type($eventId) = 'string' and $length($eventId) > 0 and $type($fileId) = 'string' and $length($fileId) > 0 and $type($correlationId) = 'string' and $length($correlationId) > 0 and $type($scanCausationId) = 'string' and $length($scanCausationId) > 0 and $type($idempotencyKey) = 'string' and $length($idempotencyKey) > 0 and $type($routingSourceKey) = 'string' and $length($routingSourceKey) > 0 and $type($routingSourceVersionId) = 'string' and $length($routingSourceVersionId) > 0 and $type($routingSourceSizeBytes) = 'number' and $floor($routingSourceSizeBytes) = $routingSourceSizeBytes and $routingSourceSizeBytes >= 0 and $routingSourceSizeBytes <= $maximumSize %}

Invalid Routing Event.Cause: The event does not satisfy the FileScanResultRecorded.v1 routing contract

Invalid Stored Routing Operation.Cause: The routing idempotency record is missing required workflow state

Invalid Routing Source Object.Cause: The exact processing version does not match the scan-result event

Arguments.UpdateExpression: SET #status = :status, upload_id = :upload_id, part_count = :part_count, part_size = :part_size, updated_at = :updated, in_progress_expiration = :lease

Choices.Condition: {% $routingPartsListTruncated = false and $count($routingCompletedParts) = $routingPartCount and $count($filter($routingCompletedParts, function($part) { $part.PartNumber >= 1 and $part.PartNumber <= $routingPartCount and $part.Size = ($part.PartNumber = $routingPartCount ? $routingSourceSizeBytes - (($routingPartCount - 1) * $partSize) : $partSize) })) = $routingPartCount %}

Catch.Next: List Routing Parts After Completion Failure

Ambiguous Routing Copy Failure.Cause: The routing copy outcome could not be reconciled without risking a duplicate destination version

Arguments.UpdateExpression: SET #status = :status, copy_method = :copy_method, destination_bucket = :destination_bucket, destination_key = :destination_key, destination_version_id = :destination_version_id, updated_at = :updated, in_progress_expiration = :lease

Uncheckpointed Routing Copy Rolled Back.Cause: The exact destination version was removed because its durable checkpoint did not commit

Ambiguous Routing Copied Checkpoint Fail.Cause: The routing copy checkpoint outcome could not be reconciled safely

Uncheckpointed Routing Destination Clean.Cause: The uncheckpointed destination version could not be removed safely

Arguments.UpdateExpression: SET #status = :status, updated_at = :updated, in_progress_expiration = :lease REMOVE upload_id, part_count, part_size

Routing Multipart Reconciliation Failure.Cause: An ambiguous routing multipart upload could not be reconciled safely

Routing Multipart Copy Failure.Cause: The multipart routing copy failed after its bounded recovery attempt

Verify Routing Destination Object.Comment: All source tags are preserved and verified; final GuardDuty tag-status comparison is intentionally deferred because the scan event is authoritative.

Choices.Condition: {% $routingDestinationObjectHead.ContentLength = $routingSourceSizeBytes and $routingDestinationObjectHead.ServerSideEncryption = 'aws:kms' and $routingDestinationObjectHead.SsekmsKeyId = $routingDestinationKmsKeyArn and $count($keys($routingDestinationObjectHead.Metadata)) = $count($keys($expectedRoutingDestinationObjectMetadata)) and $count($filter($keys($expectedRoutingDestinationObjectMetadata), function($key) { $lookup($routingDestinationObjectHead.Metadata, $key) = $lookup($expectedRoutingDestinationObjectMetadata, $key) })) = $count($keys($expectedRoutingDestinationObjectMetadata)) and $routingDestinationObjectTagFingerprint = $routingSourceObjectTagFingerprint %}

Routing Destination Object Verification.Cause: The destination version does not match the exact processing object attributes

Arguments.UpdateExpression: SET #status = :status, routed_event_id = :event_id, routed_event_idempotency_key = :idempotency_key, published_at = :published, updated_at = :updated, in_progress_expiration = :lease
